prospect.name: Natasha Singh
prospect.title: Director of Digital and Information Security

research_text: Natasha Singh leads digital security at Meridian Health Sciences. She has recently been pulled into a cross-functional initiative to address brand impersonation risks including fake pharmacy sites claiming to sell Meridian products ahead of commercial launch. She is working with legal to define the scope of digital brand monitoring and has been briefed on the intersection between cybersecurity threat vectors and trademark enforcement. She has experience with third-party brand monitoring tools in a previous role at a larger pharma.
offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
company_context.cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?
